title: inga ingoides
intro: Inga ingoides, also known as the Guanacaste tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Inga ingoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support wound healing, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Inga ingoides can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
